fields.name: api_key
fields.title: API Key
fields.description: Your ClickUp personal API token

custom_description:
ClickUp is a productivity platform that provides project management, task tracking, docs, goals,
and time tracking for teams. This connector provides access to workspaces, spaces, folders, lists,
tasks (including workspace-wide search), comments, goals, views, time tracking, members, and docs.
supported_questions:
- List all workspaces I have access to
- Show me the spaces in my workspace
- List the folders in a space
- Show me the lists in a folder
- Get the tasks in a list
- Get details for a specific task
- Search for tasks containing 'bug' across my workspace
- Find all urgent priority tasks in my workspace
- Show me tasks assigned to a specific user
- List comments on a task
- Get threaded replies on a comment
- Create a comment on a task
- Update a comment to mark it resolved
- List all goals in my workspace
- Get details for a specific goal
- Show me all workspace-level views
- Get tasks matching a saved view
- List time entries for my workspace this week
- Get details for a specific time entry
- Show me the members assigned to a task
- List all docs in my workspace
- Get details for a specific doc
- What tasks are overdue in my workspace?
- Which tasks were updated in the last 24 hours?
- Show me all high-priority tasks across all projects
- How much time has been tracked this week?
- What are the most commented tasks?
unsupported_questions:
- Delete a task
- Delete a comment
- Delete a goal

first_operation.description: View the details of the authenticated user's ClickUp account

user.description: View the details of the authenticated user's ClickUp account

teams.description: Get the workspaces (teams) available to the authenticated user

spaces.description: Get the spaces available in a workspace
Get a single space by ID

folders.description: Get the folders in a space
Get a single folder by ID

lists.description: Get the lists in a folder
Get a single list by ID

tasks.description: Get the tasks in a list

schema.description: Whether this is the last page of results

parameters.name: custom_task_ids
parameters.description: Set to true to use a custom task ID

tasks.description: Get a single task by ID

parameters.name: team_id
parameters.description: The workspace ID to search within

parameters.name: search
parameters.description: Free-text search across task name, description, and custom field text

parameters.name: custom_fields
parameters.description:
JSON array of custom field filters. Each object: {"field_id": "<UUID>", "operator": "<OP>", "value": "<DATA>"}.
Operators: = (contains), == (exact), <, <=, >, >=, !=, !==, IS NULL, IS NOT NULL, RANGE, ANY, ALL, NOT ANY, NOT ALL

tasks.description:
View the tasks that meet specific criteria from a workspace. Supports free-text search
and structured filters including status, assignee, tags, priority, and date ranges.
Responses are limited to 100 tasks per page.

schema.description: Whether this is the last page of results

comments.description: Get the comments on a task
Create a comment on a task
Get threaded replies on a comment

goals.description: Get the goals in a workspace
Get a single goal by ID

views.description: Get a single view by ID

view_tasks.description: Get tasks matching a view's pre-configured filters — useful as a secondary search mechanism

schema.description: Whether this is the last page of results

time_tracking.description: Get time entries within a date range for a workspace

parameters.name: time_entry_id
parameters.description: The ID of the time entry

time_tracking.description: Get a single time entry by ID

members.description: Get the members assigned to a task

parameters.name: cursor
parameters.description: Cursor for pagination to the next page of results

docs.description: Search for docs in a workspace

schema.description: Cursor for pagination to the next page of results

docs.description: Fetch a single doc by ID
